title: Brochoneura chapelieri
taxonomy: Brochoneura chapelieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of this plant places it within the genus Brochoneura, which contains several species of evergreen trees and shrubs. Brochoneura chapelieri is closely related to other members of the Lauraceae family, including the genus Phyllostemonodon. Further classification of the plant is based on its unique characteristics and physical traits.
